leaf_formula_note: Gradient: CalcAverage(SumDer,SumWeights,scaledL2). Newton: SumDer/(-SumDer2+scaledL2) (Logloss der2=-p(1-p) makes it distinct from Gradient; RMSE der2=-1 makes Newton==Gradient). Exact: CalcOneDimensionalOptimumConstApprox -> weighted quantile (MAE alpha=0.5,delta=1e-6) of leaf residuals (target-approx). Simple: == Gradient leaf-delta (A6, CalcLeafDeltasSimple Gradient branch).
staged_layout: flat f64: stage 0 (n_rows), then stage 1, ... ; n_iterations stages (raw approximant / logit)
